projects.title: Rocket Landing
projects.description: A mobile game where players must safely land a rocket on a platform, testing their reflexes and precision. Over 1k downloads on Play Store.
projects.descriptionLong: Rocket Landing is a mobile game where players must safely land a rocket on a platform, testing their reflexes and precision. The game features various difficulty levels and has achieved over 1k downloads on the Play Store.

projects.title: Silent Pit
projects.description: A first-person horror game set in a deep pit and a rusted underground facility. Restore power and escape... but the monster hears you.
projects.descriptionLong: Silent Pit is a first-person horror game set in a deep pit and a rusted underground facility. Players must restore power and escape, but the monster can hear them. Features advanced AI behavior, custom shaders, and atmospheric lighting.

projects.title: ZombieX
projects.description: A co-op isometric shooter where you and your team fight endless waves of zombies. Survive, upgrade, and push back the horde - before it's too late.
projects.descriptionLong: ZombieX is a co-op isometric shooter where players fight endless waves of zombies. Features online multiplayer for 4 players, custom shaders, Steamworks integration, and mirror networking.

projects.title: Heistgaard
projects.description: A 2D platformer where you play as a skilled thief working for Loki. Your mission: steal Thor's relic while evading traps and enemies.
projects.descriptionLong: Heistgaard is a 2D platformer where players play as a skilled thief working for Loki. The mission: steal Thor's relic while evading traps and enemies. A relentless boss pursues the player throughout the heist. A 12-developer team project completed in 2 months as part of school curriculum.

projects.title: Mislender
projects.description: A multiplayer horror game with proximity chat where players must work together to fix their broken car and escape the haunted forest.
projects.descriptionLong: Mislender is a multiplayer horror game with proximity chat where players must work together to fix their broken car and escape the haunted forest. AI creatures track players using sound and movement - work together quietly or risk being hunted down. A solo project.

projects.title: SlenderMultiplayer
projects.description: A multiplayer horror game where players work together to collect pages while being hunted by Slender. Features proximity chat and randomized map layouts.
projects.descriptionLong: SlenderMultiplayer is a multiplayer horror game where players work together to collect pages while being hunted by Slender. Features proximity chat and randomized map layouts for replayability.

profile.name: Ryan Jhider
profile.title: Game Design & Programming Student
profile.bio: Passionate game developer specializing in Unity, C#, and multiplayer systems.
profile.description: 3rd year Game Design & Programming student at ISART Digital. Specialized in Unity, C#, multiplayer systems, and horror game design.
